title: Yippee MC SMP - Client Pack
description: This is the server modpack for Yippee SMP, now hosted on Modrinth!
body:
# Yippee SMP
This is the official client modpack for the Yippee SMP Modded Minecraft server!
While the pack is tailored for the YMC server, you are free to do what you'd like with it! 
Do note: This pack contains some client-only mods which must be removed before the pack can be run on a dedicated server!

If you haven't already, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/KWCZfEhtBj) to join us!

# Pack Contents
The pack aims to expand the industrial and automation side of Minecraft as well as give players the opportunity to engineer complex contraptions and vehicles, with a healthy amount of other content sprinkled in.

Includes Create, Various Create addons, Minecraft Comes Alive, Valkyrien Skies, Clockwork, and more.

# Other Notes

Sometimes a mod just fails to load for some reason. Just restart the client and it should work. Standard modded Minecraft moment.
